name: agent-skill
description: Harness builder + visual-QA + (future) optimisation skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: harness-builder
plugins.description: Bootstrap CLAUDE.md, .claude/agents/, hooks, and plugin wiring with /agent-init

plugins.name: harness-floor
plugins.description: Cost-unrestricted patterns starting with /visual-qa (visual regression + LLM analysis via Playwright MCP)

plugins.name: harness-builder-codex
plugins.description: Run agent-init for Codex CLI projects — emits AGENTS.md + .codex/skills/

plugins.name: harness-builder-copilot
plugins.description: Run agent-init for GitHub Copilot CLI — emits .github/copilot-instructions.md + AGENTS.md

plugins.name: harness-builder-gemini
plugins.description: Run agent-init for Gemini CLI (a.k.a. 'antigravity') — emits GEMINI.md + .gemini/skills/

plugins.name: harness-floor-codex
plugins.description: visual-qa scaffold for Codex CLI — emits .visual-qa.json + Playwright MCP entry
